sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees(`department` String, `name` String, `salary` UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT department, name, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) AS ranking FROM employees;
UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.05 WHERE department = 'Sales';
SELECT department, name, salary, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY salary) AS overall_rank FROM employees;
